summary: Urban growth boundaries for Bay Area from 2016 by jurisdiction with type, approval status, expiration, and county.
Preservation index for 5-19 unit renter buildings in Bay Area with sale price data and EPC 2050 designation.
Preservation priority area for 50+ unit renter buildings in Bay Area with unit count and sale price data.
Bay Area urban development scenario event data with population and jobs targets, planning method, and feedback end date.
Preservation priority area for 1-4 unit renter buildings in Bay Area by census block with building size counts.
Bay Area transit model network lines with line name, frequency by time period, and one-way status.
Plan Bay Area 2040 year 2020 baseline VMT per capita by Transportation Analysis Zone with total population and VMT.
Bay Area Vital Signs city-level asking rent data from 2017-2025 with typical annual rents and inflation-adjusted values.
Bay Area Vital Signs regional household income data by percentile from 2010 forward with inflation-adjusted values.
Bay Area Vital Signs county-level street pavement condition data by year with PCI 3-year average and total lane miles.
